hero.headline: Bring out the wild side of your team.
hero.sub: Create a room, share a 6-character code and break the ice with your team — remote or in the office. Up to 20 players, in English or Spanish.
hero.question: Question
hero.answer3: A meeting that could have been an email.

game.youAreJudge: You are the judge this round

step1.title: Create the room
step1.desc: Choose the game language (English or Spanish) and get a 6-character code instantly.

step2.title: Gather the team
step2.desc: Share the code and up to 20 people join with their name from mobile or browser. No install needed.

step3.title: Play and vote
step3.desc: Each round a question card comes out, everyone plays their answer and the judge crowns the funniest.

pricing.title: Save your games. Come back anytime.
pricing.sub: You can play without an account — you just need the code. But if you sign up (free), we save your rooms, favourite decks and match history.

cta.title: Ready for the first game?
cta.sub: Free, no downloads required. Create a room and share the code.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.ACCEPT_TERMS: You must agree to the Terms and Conditions
errors.INVALID_DATA: Invalid data or the user already exists
errors.DUPLICATE_PLAYER: Ya hay un jugador con ese nombre desde esta red

footer.tagline: The card game that brings out the wild side of your teams. Made for laughs and good company.

login.welcome: Welcome back to the wild side.
login.welcomeSub: Your rooms, decks, and match history are waiting. Sign in and jump right back in.
login.joinWithCode: Join a game with a code

register.headline: Your account, for free.
register.cardSub: No credit card, no ads. Just playing with your team.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including one uppercase letter and one number.
register.freeNote: Free forever · no credit card required

features.1: Save your rooms and reopen them in one click.
features.2: All decks at hand · Spanish and English.
features.4: Your name and avatar, ready for the next game.
